heading: Inclusion of offenses relating to child pornography in definition of sexual activity for which any person can be charged with a criminal offense
label: 2427 Inclusion of offenses relating to child pornography in definition of sexual activity for which any person can be charged with a criminal offense
text: In this chapter, the term “sexual activity for which any person can be charged with a criminal offense” does not require interpersonal physical contact, and includes the production of child pornography, as defined in section 2256(8).
notes: Amendments2023— inserted “does not require interpersonal physical contact, and” before “includes”.Pub. L. 118–31
amendments: Amendments2023— inserted “does not require interpersonal physical contact, and” before “includes”.Pub. L. 118–31
